_doc: Batch-tier peers (EVALUATOR_PLAN.md §4.5): external one-shot ternary evaluators, for benchmarks + differential conformance only (never elaboration). In-process disp backends (eager, naive) are BatchRunners via src/eval/batch.ts#sessionBatchRunner and are NOT declared here. The lambada peers are all wired in code via src/eval/lambada.ts#lambadaRunner(name); this file documents the contract. Ternary 0/1/2 preorder-arity is byte-identical to disp's (CONFIRMED — see EVALUATOR_LAMBADA_PLAN.md §2). The disp benchmark (bench/bench-evaluators.ts) drives these.

lambada._doc: All 11 lambada-llc/tree-calculus evaluators, exposed by one bundled CLI (evaluators/lambada/build.sh ⇒ artifacts/cli.cjs). Invoke a given evaluator argv-style: `node <cli> -e <evaluator> -ternary <term> <term> ...` — folds from identity, prints ternary NF on stdout and startup-free `reduce_ms=<n>` on stderr.
